title: 5H Protocol – AI Proxy Wire Protocol Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions for the AI Proxy Wire Protocol: ContactRequest, ProxyResponse, ConsentReceipt, and EdgeRevocationAck. Based on Grok/xAI wire protocol specification; augmented with Claude/Anthropic additions (model_version_hash, consent_expiry, receipt_mode).

UUIDv7.description: UUIDv7: time-ordered UUID. Preferred over v4 for sortable request IDs.

ContactRequest.title: ContactRequest
ContactRequest.description: Payload sent to a proxy's POST /v1/proxy/forward endpoint. MUST be signed by the requester's private key and encrypted to the proxy's public key before transmission.

request_id.description: Unique identifier for this contact request. Stable across all hops.

requester_did.description: DID of the originating requester. MAY be masked (set to a pseudonym DID) if anonymity_level='full' or 'pseudonym'.

target_did.description: DID of the intended final recipient.

hop_number.description: Current hop index in the chain. Hop 1 = first intermediary after requester. Implementations MUST reject requests with hop_number exceeding their configured max-hops policy.

intent_type.description: Structured intent category for deterministic filtering by intermediaries before AI processing. (Gemini/Google recommendation.)

summary.description: Short, plain-language summary of the request intent. Shown to every intermediary node.

full_text.description: Optional full message body. MUST be encrypted separately; intermediaries see only the summary unless they are the escrow or final target.

anonymity_level.description: Requester's desired identity disclosure level. 'full': requester DID is masked at all hops. 'pseudonym': consistent pseudonym DID used. 'identified': true DID disclosed.

preferred_outcome.description: Requester's preference for how this hop handles the request. Intermediary may override based on its own policy.

consent_receipts.description: Ordered array of ConsentReceipt objects emitted by all previous hops. Receipt chain mode is determined by the receipt_mode field of the first receipt.

proxy_authorization.description: Evidence that both requester and target have authorized this specific proxy to act as an interim node. Required when routing through an AI proxy node.

model_version_hash.description: SHA-256 hash committing to the specific model version and system prompt the proxy is running. MUST match the value in the proxy node's ai_proxy_config at the time of consent. If the proxy has updated its configuration since consent was granted, this request MUST be rejected and a new opt-in cycle initiated. (Claude/Anthropic recommendation.)

consent_expiry.description: Timestamp after which this proxy authorization is no longer valid. Proxy MUST reject requests with an expired authorization.

requester_auth_signature.description: Requester's signature over (proxy_did || model_version_hash || consent_expiry || request_id).

target_auth_signature.description: Target's pre-authorization signature over (proxy_did || model_version_hash || consent_expiry). May be a standing authorization or per-request.

rate_limit_token.description: Optional. Proof-of-work nonce or vouch credit receipt satisfying the receiving node's rate-limit policy. Required for Level-0 requesters when the intermediary enforces Sybil-resistance rules.

ttl_hops.description: Maximum remaining hops before this request expires. Each intermediary MUST decrement by 1 before forwarding. If ttl_hops reaches 0, the intermediary MUST reject with a 'ttl_expired' error.

signature.description: Ed25519 (or ML-DSA-87) signature by the requester's private key over the canonical JSON serialization of this object (with the 'signature' field set to empty string). Intermediaries MUST verify before acting.

encryption.description: Encryption algorithm used for full_text and any other encrypted subfields. 'pq-hybrid-kyber768' is the post-quantum hybrid option.

ProxyResponse.title: ProxyResponse
ProxyResponse.description: Response returned by a proxy's /v1/proxy/forward endpoint. Always includes a signed ConsentReceipt.

decision.description: The action this proxy is taking. 'forward': passing to next hop. 'reject': chain ends here. 'summarize': summarized version forwarded. 'escrow': held pending dual approval. 'accept-and-connect': proxy is the terminal node and accepts on behalf of target.

summary.description: AI-generated summary of the request intent. Required when decision='summarize'. MUST NOT include information not present in the original summary field.

escrow_token.description: Opaque token for escrow release. Required when decision='escrow'. The target uses this token to retrieve the full message upon approval via /v1/proxy/escrow/{escrow_token}/release.

next_hop_did.description: DID of the next intermediary or target. Required when decision='forward' or 'summarize'.

failure_class.description: When decision='reject': classifies the failure type. 'soft': requester may retry with modifications. 'hard': requires chain rollback (e.g. blocklist hit). 'critical': abort and escalate (e.g. policy violation, detected prompt injection). (ChatGPT/OpenAI failure taxonomy.)

error.description: Human-readable error details. Required when decision='reject'.

rate_limit_retry_after.description: When code='rate_limit_exceeded': earliest timestamp the requester may retry.

pow_challenge.description: When code='rate_limit_exceeded' and the node uses proof-of-work: the challenge nonce the requester must solve to bypass the limit.

ConsentReceipt.title: ConsentReceipt
ConsentReceipt.description: Cryptographic record emitted by every node (human or AI) that processes a ContactRequest. The chain of receipts provides the audit trail. receipt_mode controls whether the target receives the full chain or a privacy-preserving alternative.

proxy_did.description: DID of the node issuing this receipt. For human nodes, this is their personal DID. For AI proxies, this is the owner DID of the proxy.

action_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonical serialization of (request_id || hop_number || decision || timestamp). Binds the receipt to the specific action taken.

chain_root_hash.description: When receipt_mode='merkle_root' or 'blind': SHA-256 Merkle root over all prior receipts in the chain, including this one. The target verifies chain integrity against this root without seeing individual hop identities.

receipt_mode.description: Controls how the receipt chain is presented to the final target. 'full_chain': target receives all receipts including intermediary DIDs (v0.1 default; maximum auditability, minimum privacy). 'merkle_root': target receives only chain_root_hash; individual hop identities are withheld; an authorized auditor (with both parties' consent) may open the full chain. 'blind': blind-signature scheme; each hop signs without seeing prior hop identities; provides strongest privacy guarantee. (Claude/Anthropic recommendation; 'full_chain' is default for backward compatibility.)

model_version_hash.description: For AI proxy hops only: SHA-256 hash of (model_id || system_prompt_template) at the time this action was taken. Verifiable against the proxy's registered ai_proxy_config. Allows target to confirm the proxy configuration they consented to was the one actually used.

signature.description: Signature by the issuing node's private key over (receipt_id || hop_number || proxy_did || timestamp || action_hash || chain_root_hash || receipt_mode). MUST be verifiable against the node's registered public_key.

RedactionRequest.title: RedactionRequest
RedactionRequest.description: Payload for POST /v1/proxy/redact/{request_id}. Triggers deletion of local logs and returns a cryptographic proof of deletion.

signature.description: Requester's signature over (request_id || requester_did || 'REDACT'). Proxy MUST verify before acting.

RedactionProof.title: RedactionProof
RedactionProof.description: Response to a RedactionRequest. Cryptographic proof that the proxy has deleted its local log entries for the specified request.

deletion_hash.description: SHA-256 tombstone: hash of (request_id || proxy_did || deletion_timestamp || 'DELETED'). Proves specific content was deleted at this time without reproducing the deleted content.

x-endpoints.description: Required HTTP endpoints for any conforming AI proxy node.

endpoints.auth: Ed25519 signature on request body; proxy verifies before acting

endpoints.description: Target calls this to release a held escrow after mutual approval. Auth: target's DID signature.
Returns proxy liveness status and current model_version_hash for verification.
